calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Instructing Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number 292615 The Rock 2000 Charitable Remainder Trust and case number 292616 The Rock 2000B Charitable Remainder Trust.

Appearances: George Montgonery for Arthur Rock (Petitioner).

Mr. Montgomery stated that he had represented Mr. Rock for over twenty years as an individual, that he did not think he should have two attorneys, that the only issue was if the Trustee wrote a check without a court order and the tax issue. The Court granted the petitions (signing the orders for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
